title: centaurea × nussbaumeri
intro: Centaurea × nussbaumeri, also known as Nussbaumer's knapweed, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea × nussbaumeri include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
